source_notes: Statcast overlay refreshed at 06:00 ET. Pulled 2026-05-14 finals (11 games) via MLB Stats API. Today's slate has 15 games. Lineup endpoint at 6 AM ET returned empty player arrays as expected and boxscore.teams.{home,away}.team.probablePitcher was unset for all 15 games this morning, so all probable pitchers are marked TBD pending the 9 AM lineup hydrate. Batter pools were carried forward for the 22 prior teams that overlap with today's slate; new teams ARI, BAL, TBR, TEX have placeholder rosters until top hitter refresh. Statcast pitch level fields (xwOBA, barrel pct, exit velo) remain null in this build and downstream skills hydrate before slate lock.

games.matchup: Kansas City Royals @ Chicago White Sox
San Francisco Giants @ Los Angeles Dodgers

lineup_endpoint_note: Lineup endpoint returned empty player arrays for all 15 today games at 6 AM ET as expected. Boxscore.teams.{home,away}.team.probablePitcher returned unset for every game pulled, so all 30 starter slots default to TBD and will hydrate on the 9 AM run.
